verdict_reasoning: SYNE1 (Nesprin-1) is a KASH domain-containing spectrin-repeat protein resident in the nuclear envelope as part of the LINC (Linker of Nucleoskeleton and Cytoskeleton) complex. It anchors the nuclear lamina to the cytoskeleton via a transmembrane domain in the NE, not the plasma membrane. No documented surface trafficking, secretion, shedding, or alternative surface-localized isoforms exist.
